# ─── Thread 3: Encoder ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Spawn threads

    # Wait for all threads to finish
    t_dec.join()
    t_gpu.join()
    t_enc.join()


    # Flush encoder (must happen on main thread after encoder thread finishes)
    if not errors:
        for pkt in out_stream.encode():
            out_container.mux(pkt)

    out_container.close()
    in_container.close()
